endpoints.name: GET /quotas/{quotaCounterKey}
endpoints.description: Lists a collection of current quota counter periods associated with the counter-key configured in the policy on the specified service instance. The api does not support paging yet.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{QUOTACOUNTERKEY}} with a real quotacounterkey.

endpoints.name: PATCH /quotas/{quotaCounterKey}
endpoints.description: Updates all the quota counter values specified with the existing quota counter key to a value in the specified service instance. This should be used for reset of the quota counter values.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{QUOTACOUNTERKEY}} with a real quotacounterkey.

endpoints.name: GET /quotas/{quotaCounterKey}/{quotaPeriodKey}
endpoints.description: Gets the value of the quota counter associated with the counter-key in the policy for the specific period in service instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{QUOTACOUNTERKEY}} with a real quotacounterkey. Replace {{QUOTAPERIODKEY}} with a real quotaperiodkey.

endpoints.name: PATCH /quotas/{quotaCounterKey}/{quotaPeriodKey}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing quota counter value in the specified service instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{QUOTACOUNTERKEY}} with a real quotacounterkey. Replace {{QUOTAPERIODKEY}} with a real quotaperiodkey.
